scripts.start: export PYTHONPATH=$PYTHONPATH:. && ( [ -f pipeline/venv/bin/uvicorn ] && pipeline/venv/bin/uvicorn pipeline.server.app:app --port 8000 --host 0.0.0.0 || uvicorn pipeline.server.app:app --port 8000 --host 0.0.0.0 )
scripts.backend: export PYTHONPATH=$PYTHONPATH:. && ( [ -f pipeline/venv/bin/uvicorn ] && pipeline/venv/bin/uvicorn pipeline.server.app:app --reload --port 8000 || uvicorn pipeline.server.app:app --reload --port 8000 )
scripts.backend:mock: export PYTHONPATH=$PYTHONPATH:. && cross-env MOCK_LLM=true ( [ -f pipeline/venv/bin/uvicorn ] && pipeline/venv/bin/uvicorn pipeline.server.app:app --reload --port 8000 || uvicorn pipeline.server.app:app --reload --port 8000 )
